tweets.text: Sinking into bed, tomorrow I do a final look on my essay. Do some Science Homework. Some Global vocab. Ahh school you eat my life.
Done-ish with the essay. Just realized I'm not 100% sure of the essay question. Woops.
Set up a printer, so I can print my essay. Wow this thing is useful!

Listening to "Basketball" by Lowd. Sounds like a weird pseudo-snoop dogg song... I mean it's good but it definitely has snoop influences.
@Ergoat Insiders think its still happening or coming back. Outsiders think it dissolved thru disorganization. Few remember cop repression.
@Ergoat I’ve been thinking about this a lot lately. A lot of people want to ignore the failures and press on. Learning from them is crucial.
@Ergoat What exactly was the “last GA” - last I went to was on mayday, I think.
@hyphy_republic Thats what I’m saying. Too late now. Would have required some realistic forethought anyway. Part of me thought it’d last.
@hyphy_republic Any GA with quorum would be irresponsible to end it inherently. More than x months without quorum should trigger resolution.
@DreamHost cc @DreamHostCare - can you help me fix the SPF on my domain so I can send/receive email again? Ticket ID #8760424 (Sorry for the urgency but this is lowkey ruining my life)

Oh great- I can't fix it through my host's DNS control panel. 

Waiting on @DreamHost support to get back to me so they can maybe help fix it on their end.

Okay, but how is that any different than what lefty activists have done for decades? That's not occupying. @Ergoat @hyphy_republic @guelo
@Ergoat This is all moot because the 99% - remember them- they all think we're dead and gone. Is that not an issue? @hyphy_republic @guelo
@hyphy_republic You have to pronounce the damn thing dead to start anew. Crucial missing step. We keep pushing on, for what? @guelo @Ergoat
@DreamHost Oh no- the change they suggested seems to have made things worse. :( https://t.co/KEPBVXjn4t
@guelo The occupations are dead. The GAs are dead. The 2-yr anniversary in New York was weak, if ever there were a time to come together.
@guelo This is the sort of airy shit that makes it hard for people to stop, look at their failures, and figure out what happened.
@LittleRevCuldnt I would be really interested in a venn diagram of your reasons and a die-hard supporter. Probably truth in the overlap.
@LittleRevCuldnt Honestly read some. Obviously despise your angle but appreciate the effort. Interesting points. Not entirely false.
@hyphy_republic Dissecting the end and failings of occupy thru gov intervention and otherwise was what I was talking abt the other night btw

our society is in desperate need of a series of civil, formal debates on every major issue we face - traditional politics have failed
no more twitter

If me and my brother were mentioned as the tagteam of nationwide dictators in a presidential debate, we'd totally be exchanging high fives.
I wish Biden had pushed harder. "The difference between us and them, is that we base our beliefs on the consensus of advisors, not ideals"

Energy independence through alternative energy, not through more oil from our backyard. Very silly, this woman is.
I now drink every time Biden smiles ear-to-ear.

Sarah Palin is speaking in an obviously practiced way. "And I'd like to let you know about a few details of that program, Firstly..."
Sarah Palin: 'Paying taxes isn't patriotic'.
Ha. Palin's basically like "THIS SHOW'S MINE." I guess if I didn't think that was incredibly bitchy, I'd think that's impressive leadership.
Joe Biden is just as smooth, but he's not matching the abstract-terminess (eat your heart out, Colbert) of Palin.
Sarah Palin is speaking excellently.
I had the pause my Speed Racer torrent to watch the debate. I'm not sure if I like this trade-off.
And begin, the VP debate.
